characters.appearance: Young male, brown complexion, curly black hair, mustache, and light stubble.
characters.wardrobe: White button-down shirt with sleeves rolled up.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from stressed and confused to confident, happy, and enthusiastic.

characters.appearance: Young female, brown complexion, long dark hair.
characters.demeanor: Initially annoyed, later satisfied and calm.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Sir, please don't cancel. ये मेरी आज की पहली राइड है। मेरा 200 रुपये का नुकसान हो जाएगा। [Sir, please don't cancel. This is my first ride today. I will suffer a 200 rupee loss.]
Character A says: Sir, please don't cancel my ride. I have been waiting since the morning. This is my first ride.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core conflict: losing income due to poor communication.
- Shows a clear 'Before' (desperate, struggling in Hindi) and 'After' (confident, polite in English).
- Hooks the target audience (working professionals/gig workers) with a relatable financial pain point.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Before
Please don't cancel.
Ye meri aaj ki pehli ride hai.
Mera 200 rupaye ka nuksaan ho jayega.
After
Sir, please don't cancel my ride.
I have been waiting since the morning.
This is my first ride.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: भैया, I have changed the route. Please check your app. [Brother, I have changed the route. Please check your app.]
Character A says: Ma'am English.. No no ma'am.
Character B says: भैया, I want to change my drop location. [Brother, I want to change my drop location.]
Character A says: Of course ma'am. Please change it in the app. I will adjust the route accordingly.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a real-world customer interaction scenario.
- Highlights the embarrassment of the language barrier in the 'Before' state.
- Shows smooth, professional problem-solving in the 'After' state.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Before
Bhaiya, I have changed the route.
Please check your app.
Ma'am English.. No no ma'am.
After
Bhaiya, I want to change
my drop location.
Of course ma'am.
Please change it in the app.
I will adjust the route accordingly.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Customers से English में बात नहीं कर पाता था, इसलिए वो राइड cancel कर देते थे। मेरा बहुत नुकसान हो रहा था। [I couldn't speak in English with the customers, so they used to cancel the ride. I was facing a lot of loss.]
Character A says: लेकिन Supernova app ने मेरी प्रॉब्लम सॉल्व कर दी। रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करके मैं English सीख गया। अब customers से फुल respect और tips मिलती है। [But Supernova app solved my problem. By practicing daily, I learned English. Now I get full respect and tips from customers.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Internalizes the emotional toll of the problem (loss of money and dignity).
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution.
- Shifts the emotional state from defeated to proud and respected.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Before
Customers se English mein baat
nahi kar paata tha,
isliye wo ride cancel kar dete the.
Mera bahut nuksaan ho raha tha.
After
Lekin Supernova app ne
meri problem solve kar di.
Roz practice karke main English seekh gaya.
Ab customers se full respect aur tips milti hai.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: देखा आपने? English ना आने की वजह से कितनी दिक्कतें होती हैं। एक दिन मेरी कैब में एक बड़ी कंपनी के मैनेजर बैठे थे। [Did you see? How many problems occur due to not knowing English. One day a manager of a big company sat in my cab.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Breaks the fourth wall to speak directly to the viewer like a peer.
- Validates the viewer's struggles with English.
- Sets up the origin story of how he found the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Dekha aapne? English na aane ki wajah se
kitni dikkat hoti hai.
Ek din meri cab mein
ek badi company ke manager baithe the.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: उन्होंने मुझे Supernova app के बारे में बताया। इसमें AI ट्यूटर के साथ हम बोलकर English सीखते हैं। उन्होंने कहा कि रोज़ बस 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करनी है, और मैंने बिल्कुल वैसा ही किया। [He told me about the Supernova app. In this, we learn English by speaking with an AI tutor. He said to practice for just 10-15 minutes daily, and I did exactly that.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the core product features (AI tutor, speaking practice).
- Sets realistic expectations (10-15 mins daily) without overpromising a timeline.
- Shows the app interface visually to build trust.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Unhone mujhe Supernova app ke baare mein bataya.
Isme AI tutor ke saath hum bolkar English seekhte hain.
Unhone kaha ki roz bas 10-15 minute practice karni hai,
aur maine bilkul waisa hi kiya.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: पैसेंजर से कैसे बात करनी है, लोकेशन कैसे पूछनी है, ये सब मैंने Supernova से सीखा। I am very grateful to Supernova app. अब मेरी एक भी राइड cancel नहीं होती। अगर आपको भी बिना डरे English बोलनी है, तो Supernova बेस्ट ऐप है। [How to talk to the passenger, how to ask for the location, I learned all this from Supernova. I am very grateful to Supernova app. Now not even a single ride of mine gets cancelled. If you also want to speak English without fear, then Supernova is the best app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reiterates the real-world utility of the app (learning specific situational phrases).
- Provides a strong, confident endorsement.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call-to-action for the viewer.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Passenger se kaise baat karni hai,
location kaise poochni hai,
ye sab maine Supernova se seekha.
I am very grateful to Supernova app.
Ab meri ek bhi ride cancel nahi hoti.
Agar aapko bhi bina dare English bolni hai,
to Supernova best app hai.

brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: Removed to avoid aggressive hype and unrealistic guarantees.
